case_title: PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. vs. HUSSEINI, MOHAMMAD et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT HUSSEINI, MOHAMMAD DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HUSSEINI, MOHAMMAD
